description: RBlock Template object representing the geometry of a rigid block shape. Templates define the polyhedral geometry used when creating RBlocks.
note: Objects of this type should not be created directly. Use itasca.rblock.template.find() or itasca.rblock.template.list() to retrieve templates.

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Delete this rblock template. All rblocks that referred to this template no longer refer to any rblock template.

methods.name: moi
methods.description: Get the rblock template moment of inertia. In 2D the polar moment of inertia is used.

methods.name: moi_prin
methods.description: Get the rblock template principal moment of inertia (vector).

methods.name: moi_prin_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the rblock template principal moment of inertia.

methods.name: moi_prin_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the rblock template principal moment of inertia.

methods.name: moi_prin_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the rblock template principal moment of inertia.

methods.name: set_moi
methods.description: Set the rblock template moment of inertia.

methods.name: set_moi_prin
methods.description: Set the rblock template principal moment of inertia (vector).

methods.name: set_moi_prin_x
methods.description: Set the x-component of the rblock template principal moment of inertia.

methods.name: set_moi_prin_y
methods.description: Set the y-component of the rblock template principal moment of inertia.

methods.name: set_moi_prin_z
methods.description: Set the z-component of the rblock template principal moment of inertia.

methods.name: set_vol
methods.description: Set the rblock template volume. In 2D this is the volume per unit thickness.

methods.name: valid
methods.description: Returns True if this object is a live rblock template.

methods.name: vol
methods.description: Get the rblock template volume. In 2D this is the volume per unit thickness.
